rationale: The cited paper is used as background support in grouped literature citations, mainly to note that prior text-based UGC metrics can predict outcomes such as brand equity and that social media venues differ. The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's joint sentiment-venue model, latent construct, or estimation approach in its own theory, hypotheses, or empirical design. Its core contribution on brand selfie imagery, deep image/text classifiers, and engagement outcomes proceeds independently of that specific prior study.
